description: Create a video-based emotion rating experiment in PsychoPy Builder where participants watch short video clips and rate their emotional response. The project should be contained in /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/emotion_task/ and include the video assets (joy.mp4, sadness.mp4, neutral.mp4) from /home/ga/assets/videos/. The experiment, emotion_rating.psyexp, must utilize a conditions file named video_conditions.csv containing columns for video_file and emotion. The experiment flow should consist of an instructions routine, a playback routine using a Movie component to display the videos, and a ratings routine featuring two Slider components for 'valence' (Negative to Positive) and 'arousal' (Calm to Excited). Ensure the playback and ratings routines loop through all entries in the conditions file.
